THEVALKYRIE-BLESS.title: Bless
THEVALKYRIE-BLESS.description:
Blessing improves numerical [purple]Enchantments[/purple] by 1.
If not specified, Blessing an unenchanted card gives it one of the following enchantments at random: [purple]Sharp 3[/purple], [purple]Nimble 2[/purple], [purple]Adroit 2[/purple], [purple]Sanguine 1[/purple], or [purple]Aegis 1[/purple].
